title: per-block tip advance after all txs processed — correct crash-recovery ordering
description: Why this choice is correct: in scan_block, set_scan_tip is called AFTER all transactions are processed. If the process crashes mid-block, the tip is not advanced, so the scanner replays the block on restart. The duplicate note case is handled by is_unique_constraint. A contributor might suggest advancing the tip per-transaction to reduce replay work — wrong, because partial block state (some notes inserted, others not) is unrecoverable without advancing at block granularity. The current ordering is the only correct crash-recovery design.
close_reason: Decision record — no code change required; rationale preserved in codebase
